changelog: Phase 13A.1: split-mode picker UI on /group.php. Once the group is submitted, a payment block appears with 3 modes (host=один платит / per_seat=каждый за свои / equal=поровну). Per-seat mode renders a button per seat showing remaining amount; equal mode takes payer name + share count. Each pay-action POST /api/group-create-payment-intent.php → redirect to YK confirmation_url. New api/save-group-order.php action 'set_split_mode' persists the picker choice. New js/group-split-pay.js (live polls every 8s while pending intents exist). Token-based CSS in css/group-order.css.
